itemName.zh: Benelli M3 Super 90 12 铅径双模式霰弹枪

description.zh: 我最近开始尝试建立一种神经智能网络来控制摄像机。教会它怎么分辨人脸，怎么从数据库里找到对应的记录倒没花太多时间。接着我就开始想，如果我们能创造一种智能，让它产生自我意识，那会是怎么样呢？在许多年文明的洗礼之下，人类一直在变得更有人情味。他们开始善待彼此，开始爱护自然和动物。有一种观点认为，人类的责任原则与高度发达的文明和理性是相辅相成的。那么，这种原则适用于计算机的心智吗，由于它所具有的超强学习能力，它当然会高速演化成为一种超级心智，它一定会在这个过程中变得更人性吗？有趣吧？现在我们要先来处理这些零件。还是海岸线那地方，在你找到的天线上安装抑制器，并且以防万一，在信号塔上也安装一个。
description.en: I’ve recently tried to build a neural network to control the cameras. Teaching it to differentiate between faces and look for matches in the database didn’t take much time. Then I wondered, what if we ever create a mind, which will realize itself, what it will be like? In the last many years of civilization, humans kept becoming more humane. They started treating each other better, started caring for nature, animals. An opinion was formed that principles of human duty go side by side with highly developed civilization and reason. Then, shall it turn out that the mind of the computer, which of course will very quickly evolve into an over-mind due to its high learning capabilities, will also be most humane at the same time? Interesting, right? But we need to deal with these pests already. Install suppressors on the antennas you found, and, just in case, another one on the tower, also there on the Shoreline.
